violations.text: The cutting boards on the serving prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pasta was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Pasta was spread out on sheet pan, and placed in freezer for rapid cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area (Dishwasher, and 2 door refrigerator. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

Deli-meats located on 2 door reach-in unit and grill refrigerator unit were observed marked with a date that exceeded the 7 days limit for ready to eat foods. The food items were observed dated on 10/31/23. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

Deli meats and cheeses were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and preparation area such as dishwasher and slicer. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
